hero.title: Shaping the Future with the Power of Youth
hero.subtitle: We are a civil society organisation producing sustainable youth policies for a sustainable world, empowering young people to take an active role in societal transformation.

mission.quote: We must build a world not for youth but together with youth
mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At GEGET, we support the active participation of young people in social decision-making processes and develop youth policies in line with sustainable development goals. Our greatest aim is to strengthen the voice of youth and raise them as future leaders.

focusAreas.title: Our Focus Areas
focusAreas.subtitle: We work in six key areas to maximise the potential of young people.

policies.title: Youth Policies
policies.description: We contribute to policy development processes for youth needs and establish dialogue with decision-makers.

cities.title: Youth-Friendly Cities
cities.description: We advocate for cities to be more accessible, participatory, and livable for young people.

wellbeing.title: Youth Well-Being
wellbeing.description: We develop programmes supporting the physical, mental, and social well-being of young people.

networks.title: Youth Networks
networks.description: We strengthen connections between young people by establishing national and international youth networks.

projects.title: Youth Projects
projects.description: We design innovative projects that develop leadership and entrepreneurship skills of young people.

future.title: Empowered Towards the Future
future.description: We support young people in building a sustainable future by empowering them.

youthCities.title: Youth-Friendly Cities
youthCities.subtitle: We empower local communities by reaching young people across Turkey.
youthCities.description: We develop tailored programmes addressing the needs of young people in every city, implementing projects that take local dynamics into account.

accessible.title: Accessible Cities
accessible.description: We advocate for every young person's right to equal access to urban services.

dialogue.title: Youth Dialogue
dialogue.description: We build constructive dialogue bridges between youth and local governments.

participation.title: Democratic Participation
participation.description: We encourage active participation of young people in democratic processes.

cta.title: Be Part of the Change
cta.description: Let us work together to shape the future of young people. Every young person can be a part of change.

partners.title: Our Partner Organisations
partners.subtitle: We provide greater opportunities for young people through strong partnerships at national and international levels.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Get to know the Youth Future and Society Association.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: GEGET was founded by a group of young activists who believe that young people must play an active role in societal transformation. Since our establishment, we have reached thousands of young people across Turkey, helping them discover their potential and contribute to society. We continue to shape the future of youth through our projects in youth policy, education, social inclusion, and international cooperation.
story.paragraph1: GEGET (Youth Future and Society Association) was founded by a group of young activists who firmly believe that young people must play an active role in societal transformation. Our purpose is to amplify the voice of youth and empower them as pioneers of the future.
story.paragraph2: Since our establishment, we have reached thousands of young people across Turkey, helping them discover their potential and contribute meaningfully to society. We have developed innovative projects in the fields of youth policy, education, social inclusion, and international cooperation.
story.paragraph3: We support the active participation of young people in decision-making processes for a sustainable future, carrying out our work through scientific methods and participatory approaches. Building a world where every young person can realise their full potential is our greatest goal.
story.missionText: To support the active participation of young people in decision-making processes, strengthen their policy development capacities, and enable them to become pioneers of social change.
story.visionText: A world where young people play an effective role in social decision-making, have equal opportunities, and lead the way towards a sustainable future.
story.philosophyText: Creating participatory, inclusive, and sustainable solutions by working with young people, not just for them.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: We envision a world where young people play an effective role in social decision-making processes, have equal opportunities, and lead the way towards a sustainable future. Our vision is to build a society where every young person can discover their potential, contribute to the community, and take on responsibility as a global citizen.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: Our mission is to support the active participation of young people in decision-making processes, strengthen their policy development capacities, and enable them to become pioneers of social change. In doing so, we draw upon scientific methods, participatory approaches, and international standards.

philosophy.title: Our Working Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: We follow three fundamental steps in every project.

think.title: Think
think.description: We research the needs of young people using scientific methods, conduct data-driven analyses, and understand problems at their root.

design.title: Design
design.description: Based on research findings, we develop innovative and participatory solutions, designing projects together with stakeholders.

implement.title: Implement
implement.description: We deliver concrete results by implementing our projects in the field, measuring impact, and ensuring sustainability.

idea.title: The Birth of an Idea
idea.description: A group of young activists came together with the conviction that youth must play a more active role in societal decision-making, laying the foundations of GEGET.

founding.title: Founding the Association
founding.description: GEGET was officially established as the Youth Future and Society Association and launched its first initiatives.

projects.title: First Projects
projects.description: We launched our inaugural projects in the areas of youth policy, digital literacy, and civic participation.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The core values that guide our work.

participation.title: Participation
participation.description: We ensure the active participation of young people in all processes, placing them in decision-making roles.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We adopt an open and accountable approach in all our activities.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We go beyond traditional approaches to produce creative and technology-driven solutions.

inclusivity.title: Inclusivity
inclusivity.description: We work to ensure equal opportunities for everyone, viewing diversity as a strength.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We ensure our projects create long-term impact and uphold environmental and social sustainability.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: We create a greater sphere of impact by building strong partnerships with local and international stakeholders.

solidarity.title: Solidarity
solidarity.description: We foster a culture of solidarity among young people, accelerating societal transformation through collective action.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Discover our projects that touch the lives of young people and aim for societal transformation.

youthPolicyWorkshop.title: Youth Policy Workshop
youthPolicyWorkshop.description: A comprehensive workshop programme enabling young people to actively participate in policy development processes and engage in direct dialogue with decision-makers.

digitalLiteracy.title: Digital Literacy Programme
digitalLiteracy.description: An educational programme designed to help young people become safe, informed, and productive individuals in the digital world. It covers media literacy, digital security, and content creation.

youthFriendlyCity.title: Youth-Friendly City Index
youthFriendlyCity.description: A comprehensive assessment system that measures the livability of cities for young people and guides local governments on youth policies.

youthDialogue.title: Youth Dialogue Platform
youthDialogue.description: A digital platform fostering constructive dialogue between young people, civil society organisations, and decision-makers. It includes policy proposals and feedback mechanisms.

sustainableFutureCamp.title: Sustainable Future Camp
sustainableFutureCamp.description: An intensive camp programme where young people develop projects aligned with sustainable development goals, strengthening their leadership and entrepreneurship skills.

localGovYouthCouncil.title: Local Government Youth Advisory Council
localGovYouthCouncil.description: An advisory council mechanism ensuring youth representation in local governments and bringing a youth perspective to municipal decision-making processes.

projects.noProjects: No projects found in this category yet.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Meet our passionate and experienced team leading the way for change.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Reach out to us with your questions, suggestions, or partnership enquiries.

info.cta: Do not hesitate to get in touch with us for more information about our projects, partnership opportunities, or volunteering. We respond to every message as quickly as possible.

blog.title: Youth Open Door
blog.subtitle: The voice of youth, their stories, and writings on societal transformation.
blog.description: At GEGET, we have created a space where young people share their experiences, ideas, and projects. Here you can find articles on youth policies, civic participation, personal development, and much more.
blog.comingSoonText: Our first articles will be here very soon. The voice, experiences, and contributions of young people to societal change will be featured on this page.
blog.stayTuned: Stay tuned! Articles penned by young people are coming very soon.
